Serialized Form

  • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions

      class AlreadyAssignedException extends Exception implements Serializable

  • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Back

      class Back extends Side implements Serializable

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Position

      class Position extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • x
          int x
          The x attribute contains an integer value that represents the horizontal coordinate of the card.
        • y
          int y
          The y attribute contains an integer value that represents the vertical coordinate of the card.

  • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI

      class ClientRMI extends UnicastRemoteObject implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • disconnected
          boolean disconnected
          the disconnected attribute is a boolean that is true when the connection is lost.
        • disconnectionTimer
          Timer disconnectionTimer
          the disconnectionTimer attribute is a timer that is used to ping the server.
        • ip
          String ip
          the ip attribute is the ip of the server connecting to.
        • port
          int port
          the port attribute is the port of the server connecting to.
        • v
          View v
          the v attribute is the view connecting to.

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.Message

      class Message extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • id
          MessageId id
          The id of the message.

      class MessageToClient extends Message implements Serializable

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageToServer

      class MessageToServer extends Message implements Serializable

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.PingToClient

      class PingToClient extends MessageToClient implements Serializable

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.PingToServer

      class PingToServer extends MessageToServer implements Serializable

  • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.endgame

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.endgame.ResultsMessage

      class ResultsMessage extends MessageToClient implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • playerObjectivesCompleted
          Map<String,Integer> playerObjectivesCompleted
          A map that associates each player's nickname with the number of objectives they completed.
        • playerPoints
          Map<String,Integer> playerPoints
          A map that associates each player's nickname with their final points.

  • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.ChooseObjectiveMessage

      class ChooseObjectiveMessage extends MessageToServer implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • cardId
          int cardId
          The id of the objective card that the player is choosing.
        • player
          String player
          The nickname of the player who is choosing the objective card.

      class ChooseTokenMessage extends MessageToServer implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • player
          String player
          The nickname of the player that is choosing the token.
        • token
          Token token
          The token that the player wants to use.

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.InitMessage

      class InitMessage extends MessageToClient implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • availableGold
          List<Integer> availableGold
          The list of the available gold cards.
        • availableResource
          List<Integer> availableResource
          The list of the available resource cards.
        • goldDeckBack
          Resource goldDeckBack
          The back of the gold deck.
        • hand
          List<Integer> hand
          The hand of the player.
        • privateObjectives
          List<Integer> privateObjectives
          The list of the private objectives.
        • publicObjectives
          List<Integer> publicObjectives
          The list of the public objectives.
        • resourceDeckBack
          Resource resourceDeckBack
          The back of the resource deck.
        • startCard
          int startCard
          The id of the start card.

      class NowUnavailableMessage extends MessageToClient implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • player
          String player
          The player that has the token.
        • token
          Token token
          The token that is no longer available.

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.UpdateKingdomMessage

      class UpdateKingdomMessage extends MessageToClient implements Serializable

        • cardId
          int cardId
          The id of the card that has to be placed in the kingdom.
        • player
          String player
          The nickname of the player that has to update his kingdom.
        • pos
          Position pos
          The position of the card that has to be placed in the kingdom.
        • side
          String side
          The side of the card that has to be placed in the kingdom.

  • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.DeckCardDrawnMessage

      class DeckCardDrawnMessage extends MessageToClient implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • cardId
          int cardId
          The id of the card drawn.
        • deck
          String deck
          The deck from which the card was drawn. "r" for resource deck, "g" for gold deck.
        • resource
          Resource resource
          The resource of the card drawn.

      class DrawAvailableMessage extends MessageToServer implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • cardId
          int cardId
          The id of the card that the player wants to draw.
        • player
          String player
          The nickname of the player that wants to draw the card.

      class DrawDeckMessage extends MessageToServer implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • deck
          String deck
          The deck from which the player wants to draw the card.
        • player
          String player
          The player that wants to draw a card.

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.UpdateAvailableView

      class UpdateAvailableView extends MessageToClient implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • available
          List<Integer> available
          The new available cards.
        • availableChanged
          String availableChanged
          The name of the list that changed.
        • deck
          String deck
          The deck that changed.
        • topOfDeck
          Resource topOfDeck
          The top card of the deck.

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.UpdateDeckView

      class UpdateDeckView extends MessageToClient implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • deck
          String deck
          The deck that changed.
        • resource
          Resource resource
          The top card of the deck.

  • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server

    • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer

      class RMIServer extends UnicastRemoteObject implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • clients
          Map<Integer,RMIClientSkeleton> clients
          This map contains the clients that are connected to the server. The key is the client's id and the value is the client's RMIClientSkeleton.
        • disconnectionTimer
          Map<Integer,Timer> disconnectionTimer
          This map contains the timers that are used to check if the clients are still connected to the server. The key is the client's id and the value is the client's Timer.
        • multipleMatchesHandler
          MultipleMatchesHandler multipleMatchesHandler
          This object is used to manage the multiple matches that are played at the same time.
        • pingThread
          Thread pingThread
          This thread is used to start the pinging thread that checks if the clients are still connected to the server.
